channel.title: ESS Events on Engineering Students' Society U of C

item.title: Annual General Meeting (AGM)
item.description: The Annual General Meeting is where students come together to review the year, discuss important issues, and vote on motions that shape decisions affecting the entire student body. It’s a space for open discussion, transparency, and making meaningful changes moving forward.
